name: OpenFOAM · solidDisplacementFoam (firing evaluation)
description: A reusable OpenFOAM integration node: evaluate ONE ceramic-sintering firing curve with a real solidDisplacementFoam thermo-mechanical run (zirconia 3Y-TZP puck Ø60×12 mm, quarter-symmetry mesh) in the opencfd/openfoam-default:2506 Docker image, and extract peak von-Mises stress, soak completeness (min core temperature during the hold), and total cycle time. This is the single-evaluation kernel of demo 59 lifted into a standalone, brandable building block: a Start (ramp/cool/hold + thresholds), one AutomatedStep (case generation → solve → extraction → media-card PNG), and an End that surfaces the objectives. Drop it onto any canvas as a sub-workflow node — a constrained-BO loop, a DOE sweep, or a one-shot check. `solver_mode=surrogate` (or `auto` on a Docker-less machine) evaluates a closed-form surrogate calibrated against three cluster-validated runs, so the node works end-to-end without Docker.

pack.name: OpenFOAM Core
pack.description: Core OpenFOAM integration nodes shipped with the platform.
